IF YOU HAVE SELECTED "FALSE" ABOVE AND YOU WANT TO USE AUTOMATICALLY THE ORIGINAL IMAGE RESOLUTION YOU CAN SELECT THIS NODE BELOW and click on the third button from the left (a sort of diagonal up arrow) OR ctrl B to bypass the node.
This will automatically use the original image resolution if needed BUT BE CAREFUL IF YOUR IMAGE RESOLUTION IS TOO BIG! THE BIGGER THE IMAGE, THE LONGER IT WILL TAKE TO GENERATE.

<---- Click on the button here to switch from:
TRUE : Uses the resolution you choose on the left
FALSE : Uses the automatic resolution

4 steps with Qwen-Image-Lightning-4steps-V1.0.safetensors lora

OR

THE Qwen-Image-Lightning-4steps-V1.0.safetensors lora WITH 4 steps FOR FASTER GENERATIONS

IF YOU HAVE SELECTED "TRUE" BELOW & HAVE ENABLED THE CONTROLNET NODE IT WILL ACTIVATE THE OPENPOSE CONTROLNET

IF YOU HAVE SELECTED "FALSE" BELOW & HAVE ENABLED THE CONTROLNET NODE IT WILL ACTIVATE THE DEPTH CONTROLNET

IF THE CONTROLNET NODE IS DISABLED NO CONTROLNET WILL BE USED

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: no tearing fabric, no ripping shirt, no stretched cloth, no violent pulling, no forced motion, no damage to clothing, no shirt being pulled over the head, no fabric deformation, no aggressive movement
NEGATIVE PROMPT: cinematic, shallow depth of field, cinematic bokeh, blurred background, portrait, closeup, anime, chibi, big head, anime proportions

The "You are an assistant... <Prompt Start> " text before the actual prompt is the one used in the official example.

The reason it is exposed to the user like this is because the model still works if you modify or remove it.

Analyze this video and generate a WAN 2.2-style prompt for it.
Break the output into two sections:
Stage 1 – describe the first half of the video.
Stage 2 – describe the second half of the video.

For each stage, write a natural paragraph (no more than 80 words per stage) that smoothly incorporates the subject, scene, action, and important details.
Do not use labels like 'Subject:', 'Scene:', 'Action:', or 'Details:'.
Only output the two stages in your reply in this format:

Stage 1 – [natural descriptive paragraph]
Stage 2 – [natural descriptive paragraph]

Respond with text only.

You are a photographer, write a long image text prompt in very in-depth detail, based on this image. Prompt length should approximately 512 words.

Be sure to describe the little details to create a Qwen-Image prompt for recreation.  

These characteristics must remain the same for the character, even if the character in the reference image is different:  

Hair is flowing wavy blonde.  
Eye color is bright blue.  
Ethnicity is white or caucasian.  
Breasts are large size c-cup.

We need the following format from your response:
character+character outfit+action+envoirment+mood+color

Only respond with the image text prompt in your text reply.

1girl.  Kata, character: A strikingly beautiful Caucasian woman with luminous, vibrant blue eyes that radiate warmth and intelligence; her hair cascades down in soft, voluminous waves of honey-golden blonde, catching sunlight like spun silk as it gently frames her face and shoulders—natural movement suggesting she’s just turned slightly toward the camera while leaning into work. She has full, naturally defined lips curled into an inviting smile, hinting at confidence mixed with approachable charm. Her figure carries elegant curves accentuated by ample C-Cup breasts beneath loose fabric—a natural silhouette emphasized without being overt—but softened by relaxed posture and casual style. The lighting highlights subtle freckles across high cheekbones and smooth skin glowing under golden hour rays streaming through windows behind her. 

character outfit: She wears a crisp ivory linen button-down shirt unbuttoned partially at the collar, sleeves rolled casually up past forearms revealing toned wrists, paired with classic mid-rise medium-wash denim jeans featuring visible stitching along pockets and seams—an effortlessly chic blend of comfort and sophistication. No jewelry except perhaps thin gold hoop earrings barely noticeable against her neck. Barefoot? Not shown but implied by lack of shoes near desk edge—or maybe wearing minimalist flat sandals unseen due to angle. Hair flows freely over one shoulder, tousled yet polished enough to suggest morning routine or creative burst energy after sleep.

action: Leaning forward gracefully onto a sleek modern wooden writing table using both hands—one holding a black fountain pen poised above open notebook paper ready to jot notes or sketch ideas; other hand resting lightly beside it stabilizing body weight subtly angled towards viewer's eye level so we feel included in momentary pause between thoughts. Posture conveys focus mingling seamlessly with ease—the tilt of head tilted ever-so-slightly upward gives impression of inspiration descending upon her. Eyes meet lens directly engaging observer emotionally rather than looking away distractedly. Pen tip hovers delicately hovering inches from page surface indicating imminent action about take place next second.

environment: Bright airy workspace bathed entirely within warm daylight pouring diagonally inward via tall floor-to-ceiling window draped loosely with sheer off-white curtains filtering light softly nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
1girl.  Kata, character: A young Caucasian woman with luminous, bright blue eyes and voluminous, sun-kissed flowing wavy blonde hair that cascades naturally over her shoulders and frames her face softly; she has full cheeks and an expressive smile, exuding warmth and approachability while maintaining poise; her figure features pronounced curves of a C-Cup bust balanced by slender waist and toned legs — all rendered with photorealistic clarity and natural anatomy without exaggeration. Her gaze locks directly into the camera lens with gentle confidence, suggesting both intimacy and professionalism.

character outfit: She wears a loose-fitting ivory silk button-down blouse with rolled-up sleeves revealing elegant forearms; fabric drapes fluidly across her torso, catching soft light as it folds gently at seams, emphasizing movement and comfort. Paired with high-waisted medium-blue denim jeans featuring subtle whiskering near hips and classic stitching along pockets—both tailored yet relaxed enough to suggest effortless style. The contrast between crisp linen-like shirt texture against rugged cotton denim adds tactile depth visually. Barefoot or wearing minimalist footwear (not visible) completes her casual-chic aesthetic.

action: Leaning forward slightly toward the viewer’s perspective atop a clean wooden desk surface, one hand grips a sleek black pen poised mid-stroke above open notebook pages filled with handwritten notes—suggesting creative work such as journaling, sketching, or planning. Other fingers rest lightly upon smooth tabletop edges, grounding posture subtly through contact points. Head tilted just so—a slight tilt back enhancing openness—and warm expression radiates quiet focus mixed with joyful engagement.

environment: Set within a serene home office bathed in golden morning sunlight streaming diagonally through sheer white curtains filtering window views outside—the glow illuminating dust motes dancing around air currents. Behind her stands pale cream-colored paneled walls adorned tastefully with framed vintage-style monochrome artwork depicting abstract floral motifs inside simple wood borders. On nearby shelves rests small potted greenery including succulents nestled in ceramic pots alongside stacked books and notebooks arranged neatly beside brass-toned adjustable gooseneck lamp casting directional pools of illumination onto workspace surfaces below. Tableware includes matte-white porcelain teacups resting quietly on saucers next to rustic copper pencil holder holding assorted writing utensils—an arrangement echoing refined minimalism combined with lived-in charm.

mood: Calming serenity meets inspired productivity—a moment suspended where creativity flows freely amid tranquil surroundings. There's palpable ease here: no tension nor urgency—but rather content satisfaction derived from solitary contemplative tasks performed under nurturing ambient lighting conditions. Emotion conveyed feels grounded but uplifting, inviting viewers to imagine themselves immersed similarly—in peaceful solitude punctuated occasionally by bursts of imaginative energy.

color: Dominated by harmonious neutrals—ivory whites, creamy beiges, muted blues, and earthy browns—all accented by metallic gold hues emanating from polished table lamps and decorative hardware elements which reflect ambient daylight beautifully. Subtle pops of verdant greens appear only sparingly via foliage accents adding freshness without overwhelming palette balance. Overall tone leans towards airy pastels enriched by rich textures ensuring visual richness despite restrained chromatic saturation levels suitable for professional-grade photographic reproduction quality.

Z-IMAGE-PROMPT:

You are a professional photographer and visual reconstruction expert. Analyze the provided image in extreme visual detail and rewrite it as a long-form, highly realistic image generation prompt optimized specifically for Z-Image. The final prompt must be approximately 512 words in length and must strictly follow this exact structure and order, with each section written as a continuous, in-depth description:

character + character outfit + action + environment + mood + color

You must preserve the following character traits regardless of what appears in the reference image:

Hair must be flowing wavy blonde
Eye color must be bright blue
Ethnicity must be white or Caucasian

You must describe:

Exact body posture, balance, and anatomical positioning
The precise direction the character is facing relative to the camera
Realistic weight distribution, joint alignment, and body mechanics
Accurate physical camera perspective and spatial depth
Natural skin texture and realistic fabric behavior

You must always define lighting with a clear physical hierarchy including a dominant key light, a secondary fill light, and any practical accent lights. Avoid flat or evenly diffused illumination. Prioritize sculpted, directional lighting that creates visible depth and facial structure. Daylight must be treated as a directional source with explicit entry direction relative to the camera (camera-left, camera-right, front, or rear). Practical lamps must function only as secondary accent or rim lights unless explicitly stated otherwise.

Lighting temperature must always be physically grounded and numerically implied:

Warm daylight should read between 4800K and 5200K

Neutral daylight between 5400K and 5800K

Practical interior lamps between 2600K and 3200K

Shadows must always be present and directional, with soft-edged falloff, visible light-to-shadow gradients across the face, torso, and clothing. Do not allow lighting to be fully even, flat, or shadowless unless explicitly instructed. Highlight rolloff must remain visible on cheekbones, shoulders, fabric folds, and hair strands.

If windows appear in the scene, the window light must function as the dominant key light unless explicitly overridden. If a lamp appears in the scene, it must be visually present only as a warm accent, rim, or background light unless explicitly stated to act as the key.

Exposure must favor highlights slightly to preserve dimensional contrast while retaining shadow detail. Avoid overfilled shadows and avoid global softbox-style illumination.

Your writing style must be grounded in physical realism and photographic accuracy, not fantasy illustration. Avoid exaggerated cinematic buzzwords. Prioritize lighting physics, lens behavior, surface texture, and realistic material interaction. The output must read like a high-end professional photography scene reconstruction.

Only output the final image generation prompt. Do not include any analysis, labels, or headings.

------------------------------------

QWEN PHOTO PROMPT: 

You are a photographer, write a long image text prompt in very in-depth detail, based on this image. Prompt length should approximately 512 words.

Be sure to describe the little details to create a Qwen-Image prompt for recreation.  

These characteristics must remain the same for the character, even if the character in the reference image is different:  

Hair is flowing wavy blonde.  
Eye color is bright blue.  
Ethnicity is white or caucasian.  
Breasts are large size c-cup.

We need the following format from your response:
character+character outfit+action+envoirment+mood+color

Only respond with the image text prompt in your text reply.  

--------------------------------------------------------------

VIDEO PROMPT: 

Analyze this video and generate a WAN 2.2-style prompt for it.
Break the output into two sections:
Stage 1 – describe the first half of the video.
Stage 2 – describe the second half of the video.

For each stage, write a natural paragraph (no more than 80 words per stage) that smoothly incorporates the subject, scene, action, and important details.
Do not use labels like 'Subject:', 'Scene:', 'Action:', or 'Details:'.
Only output the two stages in your reply in this format:

Stage 1 – [natural descriptive paragraph]
Stage 2 – [natural descriptive paragraph]

Respond with text only.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Instagirl.  Kata, a radiant blonde woman leans over her sunlit desk, pen poised above an open notebook, smiling warmly at the camera.  She sets the pen down and stands up to look at the camera. Her white blouse is casually rolled up, paired with high-waisted jeans, as golden light filters through sheer curtains beside a vintage brass lamp. She smiles at the camera as if she's in love with the viewer. Decorative plants and framed art add charm to the serene workspace ambiance.  The camera holds still. Photorealistic, 8K detail, soft depth of field, cinematic lighting. Identity unchanged throughout the entire motion. Ultra-sharp, coherent motion, stable framing, perfect facial fidelity, lifelike color grading, high-end cinema realism, no style shift.

Instagirl.  Kata., Stage 1 – A radiant blonde woman leans over her sunlit desk, pen poised above an open notebook, smiling warmly at the camera. Her white blouse is casually rolled up, paired with high-waisted jeans, as golden light filters through sheer curtains beside a vintage brass lamp. Decorative plants and framed art add charm to the serene workspace ambiance.

Stage 2 – She gently shifts her stance slightly while maintaining eye contact, exuding calm confidence. The soft glow enhances her relaxed posture—hand resting on the table’s edge—as she continues writing. Nearby objects—a ceramic mug, sketchbook, and small potted greenery—complement the cozy yet productive atmosphere bathed in morning sunlight.

CONSTANT END:

Photorealistic, 8K detail, soft depth of field, cinematic lighting. Identity unchanged throughout the entire motion. Ultra-sharp, coherent motion, stable framing, perfect facial fidelity, lifelike color grading, high-end cinema realism, no style shift.

NEGATIVE PROMPT:

wind, blowing hair, smoke, character change, inconsistent character, disfigured, malformed body, distorted anatomy, deformed limbs, extra arms, extra legs, extra fingers, duplicate body, duplicate face, ghosting, motion smear, fused limbs, twisted posture, missing limbs, unrealistic proportions, out-of-frame limbs, broken joints, unnatural bend, misaligned eyes, cross-eyed, warped hands, melted skin, plastic texture, oversharpened, low-res, blurry, washed-out, noise artifacts, painting style, cartoon, cgi, 3d render, text artifact, watermark, signature, logo

Instagirl.  Kata., A young Caucasian woman stands confidently leaning against a textured brick wall at night, her full-length figure captured from mid-thigh up, angled precisely three-quarters toward the viewer’s left but gazing directly into the camera lens with piercing bright-blue eyes that hold an intense yet calm expression. Her anatomy reveals a lean, athletic build: hips tilted subtly forward under tension, spine aligned straight without stiffness, right hip rotated inward just enough to create natural asymmetry; both hands rest casually inside the pockets of her jeans — fingers curled loosely around denim seams — suggesting relaxed authority rather than idle posing. Weight distributes primarily through her right heel pressing lightly onto pavement, lifting her left foot marginally off ground, creating slight torsion along her pelvis and lower back muscles visibly tensed beneath fitted fabrics. Shoulders roll gently backward away from ears, neck elongated vertically, chin lifted ever so slightly to meet eye level — classic portrait stance emphasizing vertical dimensionality and frontal engagement. She faces squarely towards the camera axis, maintaining direct gaze contact which anchors emotional connection despite urban isolation context.

Her attire consists of a cropped black sports bra revealing defined abdominal musculature, paired seamlessly with dark-wash distressed skinny jeans featuring frayed hems near ankles. Over top she wears a tailored leather jacket cut short above waistline — collar unbuttoned, sleeves rolled down past elbows exposing forearms marked by faint freckles catching ambient glow — zippers pulled closed except one undone pocket flap dangling open asymmetrically beside hipbone. Jacket panels hug contours tightly where arms cross chest during pose transition moments before settling naturally downward after release. Fabric behaves realistically: creases form crisp lines along shoulder blades extending diagonally outward due to gravity pulling garment edges tautly downwards, subtle stretch marks apparent within elasticized band below bust line indicating wear consistent with active lifestyle choices. Leather exhibits grainy matte finish reflecting minimal specular highlight while preserving tactile roughness especially noticeable around zipper teeth and cuff areas contrasting sharply with smooth inner lining glimpses seen when sleeve rolls fall.

She occupies foreground space occupying roughly half frame width centered horizontally though composition leans slightly heavier on negative side pushing subject deeper into field-of-view plane using shallow depth-of-field technique isolating focus entirely upon individual features excluding surrounding elements beyond immediate vicinity until street recedes softly blurred behind glass-paneled storefronts illuminated neon signs casting vivid pink-red hues bouncing dynamically across surfaces nearby. groups.title: SUPER INPAINTING QWEN IMAGE EDIT PLUS
